example_nightbane_standard_modern.stackingRule: Strike bonuses from level tiers are cumulative. Do not stack with hand-to-hand strike bonuses.
example_nightbane_standard_modern.untrainedPenalties: Shoots wild. No strike bonus whatsoever.

revolver.stackingRule: Tier 1 aimed strike overrides bundle default for revolvers.
revolver.notes: Revolvers: +4 aimed at level 1 instead of +3.

example_nightbane_standard_modern.notes: Example bundle for usesStandardModernProgression W.P. rows.
